notes: After implementing the rare-letter tie-breaker, repeated-search totals matched baseline (no throughput or depth change). Keeping tree clean and reverting.
Added a row-band diversity bonus that rewards paths spanning many distinct rows (e.g., GLAMORIZE diagonal vs GLASS horizontal). Repeated-search totals unchanged vs baseline; reverting.
Added a small column-band diversity bonus so diagonals like GLAMORIZE beat one-file paths like EEL when other signals tie. Repeated-search totals reproduced exactly at baseline, so reverting.

Added a frontier mobility bonus from unique neighboring squares around the claimed path (e.g., GLAMORIZE leaves side shoulders; EEL mostly stacks starts on one file). At divisor 6 the repeated-search profile stayed exactly at baseline, so trying a stronger scaling.

Strengthening the frontier neighboring-word-count bonus reordered search in the wrong direction: repeated-search profile fell from 364230 to 345895 while depth stayed 3. Reverting that scaling and trying a less correlated frontier signal.

Switched to a geometry-only frontier count that rewards paths exposing many neighboring squares. It was even noisier: repeated-search profile fell to 340310 with no extra depth, so reverting to the known-good baseline.

Counted distinct future word texts so a lane leaving {stare, stern, stone} would outrank one mostly preserving repeated GLAMORIZE placements. At divisor 4 the repeated-search profile matched the 364230 baseline exactly, so reverting.

Strengthening the distinct future word-text bonus still produced the exact 364230 repeated-search profile total with depth 3. The text-level signal was too correlated with the existing mobility/diversity stack, so reverting.
Rewarded paths whose future follow-ups land on several forward rows instead of one band. That reordered the profile position badly enough to stall at depth 2 on every repeated search, so reverting.
Rewarded paths that preserved many distinct future start squares. That favored noisy multi-anchor clutter over the baseline ordering and every repeated search stalled at depth 2, so reverting.
Restricted the start-square coverage bonus to long follow-ups only, hoping to favor separate long-threat anchors. It still shoved the profile search into the same bad depth-2 ordering, so reverting.

Summed per-square counts of long words along the claimed path so the middle of a GLAMORIZE lane would outrank side squares that mostly feed GLASS. The signal was far too strong: repeated-search depth fell from 3 to 2, so reverting.

Added a small per-square forward-reach bonus based on the average depth of words through each claimed cell, so lanes used by deeper attacks like PERILLED break ties over squares whose words stall locally. The repeated-search profile improved reproducibly from 364230 to 364570 in two runs, and short held at 87981.

Added a small per-square runway bonus for cells whose words usually continue farther after that square, so early spine cells in lanes like GLAMORIZE could beat terminal cells that often end the attack. The repeated-search profile slipped from 364570 to 364500 at depth 3, so reverting.

Gated the small rare-letter bonus behind above-average square forward reach so a deep-lane 'z' in GLAMORIZE could still matter without boosting shallow side-branch rarities. The repeated-search profile matched the current 364570 baseline exactly across all five runs, so reverting.

Scaled scarce-letter tie-breaks through the kept square forward-reach table so only above-average lane cells contributed rarity, aiming to keep the GLAMORIZE z signal while muting shallow side branches like EEL. The repeated-search profile matched the 364570 baseline exactly at depth 3, so reverting.

Rewarded paths only when multiple claimed cells had forward-reach scores at least one point above the board average, aiming to prefer uniformly deep lanes like PERILLED over paths with one peak GLAMORIZE anchor and shallow cleanup squares. The repeated-search profile matched the 364570 baseline exactly across all five runs, so reverting.

Counted claimed cells at or above the board-average forward reach plus one, aiming to reward lanes with several strong interior squares like PERILLED instead of one peak cell. The repeated-search profile slipped from 364570 to 364220 at depth 3, so reverting.

Added a tiny bonus for only the above-average forward-reach excess on claimed cells, aiming to reward lanes with several strong interior squares like PERILLED over a path with one GLAMORIZE anchor and shallow cleanup cells. The repeated-search profile regressed from 364570 to 360320 at depth 3, so reverting.

Added a tiny fixed bonus when at least two claimed cells had board-average forward reach, aiming to reward lanes with multiple solid interior squares like PERILLED over paths propped up by one standout GLAMORIZE anchor. The repeated-search profile slipped from 364570 to 364430 at depth 3, so reverting.

Added a tiny median-threshold consistency bonus that squared the count of claimed cells with at-least-typical forward reach, aiming to prefer uniformly deep lanes like PERILLED over routes carried by one strong GLAMORIZE anchor. The repeated-search profile regressed sharply from 364570 to 351930 at depth 3, so reverting.

Kept the existing per-square forward-reach sum and added a tiny support term from all claimed cells except the best one, aiming to favor lanes with several solid interior squares like PERILLED over routes propped up by one GLAMORIZE anchor. The repeated-search profile regressed from 364570 to 360160 at depth 3, so reverting.

Gated each claimed cell's raw word-count bonus by that same side-to-move square forward reach, keeping full credit only for deeper lanes like GLAMORIZE or PERILLED and halving shallow cleanup pockets like EEL. The repeated-search profile regressed sharply from 364570 to 292440 at depth 3, so reverting.

Kept the raw per-cell count bonus but shaved half of any count beyond that cells forward reach plus two, so deep GLAMORIZE squares kept most credit while shallow EEL-style crowding paid less. The repeated-search profile regressed from 364570 to 339410 at depth 3, so reverting.

Kept the raw path word-count sum and only subtracted one point for each four surplus count points above same-cell forward reach plus two, so shallow EEL-style crowding lost just a tiny tie-break share while deep GLAMORIZE lanes stayed nearly unchanged. The repeated-search profile still regressed from 364570 to 345185 at depth 3, so reverting.

Counted only distinct next-step neighbors that continued words without retreating from each claimed square, aiming to keep PERILLED or INTERROBANG style goalward forks while cutting sideways EEL clutter. Standalone profile improved marginally and reproducibly from 364570 to 365445 at depth 3, but profile-suite failed badly: on readme-main four of five repeated searches dropped to depth 2, so reverting.

Added a tiny per-square bonus for how many goalward rows legal words usually still gained after touching each claimed cell, aiming to favor interior attack lanes like PERILLED over cleanup pockets like EEL. The repeated-search profile regressed sharply from 364570 to 264855 at depth 3, so reverting.

Retried the distinct goalward next-step branching table at a weaker weight so interior PERILLED or INTERROBANG forks still nudged ties without dominating the kept forward-reach signal. The repeated-search profile still regressed from 364570 to 360650 at depth 3, so reverting without running profile-suite.

Counted only distinct goalward next cells from each claimed square, so PERILLED-style interior forks kept credit while sideways EEL cleanups lost it. The repeated-search profile still regressed from 364570 to 360650 at depth 3, so reverting without running profile-suite.

Raised the kept per-square forward-reach bonus from divisor 4 to 3, testing whether deeper lanes like PERILLED simply needed a bit more tie-break weight than shallower cleanup squares. The repeated-search profile regressed from 364570 to 364040 at depth 3, so reverting without running profile-suite.

Added an optional policy-ordering prototype that rescored the first 64 baseline candidates from a cached linear table over static board features such as progress, forward reach, and long continuation diversity, aiming to favor deeper lanes like PERILLED over cleanup words like EEL. The repeated-search profile collapsed from 364570 to 39245 total nodes and dropped from depth 3 to depth 2 on every measured search, so reverting without running profile-suite.

Added an opt-in cached policy table that assigned a separate linear score from broad static features and used it only to break ties between equal baseline goodness values, so PERILLED-style deep lanes could edge out shallow cleanup routes without the previous top-64 reshuffle. The repeated-search profile reproduced a tiny gain from 364570 to 364630 at depth 3 in two runs, but the win was too small to clear the keep bar, so reverting without running profile-suite.

Added an optional disk-backed policy tie-break file with broad static features plus a small goalward-next branching term, but repeated-search profile only reproduced the earlier marginal gain from 364570 to 364630 at depth 3, so reverting without running profile-suite.

Retuned the optional policy file to emphasize goalward next-step branching inside equal-goodness groups, aiming to keep PERILLED or INTERROBANG-style interior forks earlier without changing the main heuristic. The repeated-search profile still reproduced the same marginal 364630 result at depth 3, so reverting without running profile-suite.

Added a disk-backed linear policy table that broke equal-goodness ties using raw static features such as forward reach, continuation diversity, and goalward branching, aiming to keep deeper lanes like INTERROBANG ahead of shallow cleanup ties.
